Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 57 

OTHC_BENE_PMT 

LABEL: Other Part B Carrier Beneficiary Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the sum of coinsurance and deductible payments from Part B carrier and DME claims 
which appear in settings other than the 10 specific categories which are part of this file for a given year. 

The total Beneficiary payments are calculated as the sum of LINE_COINSRNC_AMT +
